summary: Frontend-only testing of unified market template implementation. All 16 features verified successfully. Crypto and Exchanges tabs render with department summary bars, 24 engines each sorted alphabetically, expandable dropdown panels with 4 columns, behavior grouping (WARMING UP/CLOSED), and proper dimmed opacity for closed markets.
passed_tests: Crypto tab loads with CRYPTO heading and department summary bar (ACTIVE/READY/SCANNING/P&L/W-L counts)
Exchanges tab loads with EXCHANGE MARKETS heading and same summary format
All 24 crypto engines listed alphabetically (AAVE, ADA, APT, ARB, ATOM, AVAX, BNB, BTC, DOT, ETH...)
All 24 exchange engines listed alphabetically (AEX, ASX200, BOVESPA, CAC, DAX, DJI, FTSE, HSI...)
Closed markets appear in CLOSED group with dimmed opacity (0.45)
Open markets appear in behavior groups (WARMING UP visible, ACTIVE visible)
Clicking engine row expands dropdown panel showing 4 columns: Performance, Regime & Signals, Learned Params, Promotion
Clicking expanded row again collapses it
All 14 column headers render correctly: Market, Price, Regime, WPS, Health, Status, Side, Size, SL%, TS%, Live P&L, Total P&L, W/L, Phase
Bots tab works - shows BTC Bot and ETH Bot cards with live positions, prices, win rates, thresholds
Brain tab works - shows 10 pipeline steps with expandable details and The Bible section
No LIVE positions banner (expected - no live trades currently, but banner logic verified in code)
TopBar shows W/L (0/0), Kitty ($196.03), Today ($0.00), All Time ($0.00), Open (0), Size buttons ($10-$150), IB (LIVE), Pionex (ON)
WebSocket connection established (46 LIVE data feed status)
SIM/REAL mode toggle buttons render next to each department tab (Bots SIM, Crypto SIM, Exchange SIM)
Data feed status shows in header (46 LIVE)
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified market template implementation complete. MarketsView.jsx provides a single template for both CRYPTO and EXCHANGE MARKETS sections. Key features: (1) DeptSummary component shows ACTIVE/READY/SCANNING/P&L/W-L counts, (2) EngineHeader shows 14 columns, (3) EngineRow with expandable EngineDropdown showing 4 detail columns, (4) BehaviorGroupSection groups engines by volatility (VOLATILE/ACTIVE/STEADY/WARMING UP), (5) Closed markets in separate CLOSED group with 0.45 opacity. Engines sorted alphabetically and locked to prevent jumping on ticks. WebSocket endpoint: wss://trading-engine-hub-3.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws/engines

crypto_tab.description: 24 crypto engines with CRYPTO heading, department summary bar, alphabetical sorting, WARMING UP behavior group

exchanges_tab.description: 24 exchange engines with EXCHANGE MARKETS heading, department summary bar, alphabetical sorting, CLOSED behavior group with dimmed opacity

expandable_dropdowns.description: Click to expand shows 4 columns (Performance, Regime & Signals, Learned Params, Promotion), click again to collapse

bots_tab.description: BTC Bot and ETH Bot cards with live positions (SELL), prices, win rates, thresholds, learning log

brain_tab.description: 10 pipeline steps with expandable details, The Bible section with entries/scored/helpful/help rate stats

mode_toggles.description: SIM/REAL toggle buttons next to Bots, Crypto, and Exchange tabs

behavior_grouping.note: Engines grouped by volatility behavior, closed markets in separate CLOSED group with 0.45 opacity

alphabetical_sorting.description: Engines sorted alphabetically within groups, no jumping on ticks
